# CANONICAL SOURCES (in order of preference)
# 1. MD DBM "State Aid to Local Governments" XLSX workbook — published annually ~3 weeks after budget enactment.
#    FY26 Enacted:   https://dbm.maryland.gov/budget/Pages/operbudget/FY26StateAid.aspx
#    FY27 Enacted:   https://dbm.maryland.gov/budget/Pages/operbudget/FY27StateAid.aspx
#    FY28 Allowance: https://dbm.maryland.gov/budget/Pages/operbudget/FY28StateAid.aspx
#    Each workbook has a "Summary by County" tab and agency-specific tabs.
# 2. MD DLS "Local Aid" PDF — published with the Fiscal Briefing Book.
#    FY26: https://mgaleg.maryland.gov/pubs/budgetfiscal/2025fy-local-aid.pdf
#    FY27: https://mgaleg.maryland.gov/pubs/budgetfiscal/2026fy-local-aid.pdf (check availability)
#    Look for Exhibit B (State Aid Summary) and Exhibit 2 (County detail).
# 3. Agency-specific (use when DBM workbook lumps sub-agencies):
#    • DDA county allocation:    MDH/DDA Annual Chapter 639 Report + LTSS regional data
#    • BHA county allocation:    MDH/BHA Data Portal (https://bha.health.maryland.gov/Pages/data.aspx)
#    • MDOT highway user revenue: MDOT CTP
name: Appendix B (https://www.mdot.maryland.gov/tso/pages/ctp.aspx)
